name: brilliant-sort
description: Deterministic Brilliant Sort puzzle core and playable web slice

scripts.build: bun run build:wasm && bunx --bun vite build
scripts.harness: bun run build:cpp && bun run build:wasm && bun run src/harness/cli.ts
scripts.build:wasm: env EM_CONFIG="${EM_CONFIG:-${EMSDK:-$PWD/.cache/emsdk}/.emscripten}" "${EMSDK:-$PWD/.cache/emsdk}"/upstream/emscripten/emcmake cmake -S . -B .cache/wasm -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBRILLIANT_SORT_WASM_OUTPUT_DIR=src/wasm/generated -DBRILLIANT_SORT_AUDIO_OUTPUT_DIR=src/audio/generated && env EM_CONFIG="${EM_CONFIG:-${EMSDK:-$PWD/.cache/emsdk}/.emscripten}" cmake --build .cache/wasm --target brilliant_sort_wasm brilliant_sort_audio --parallel
scripts.test:wasm: bun run build:wasm && bun test tests/wasm
scripts.test:differential: bun run build:cpp && bun run build:wasm && bun test tests/harness/differential.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run build:cpp && bun run build:wasm && bun test && ctest --test-dir .cache/cmake --output-on-failure && bunx --bun vite build
